title: Decision Provenance Standard Decision Record
description: Decision-record schema per Standard §5 (record lifecycle) + §6.2 (decision-record schema, including §6.2.3 lifecycle/altitude/redaction additions). NOTE on two state families: `record_state` carries the §6.2 schema dispatch states (dispatched/drafted/review-required/closed/re-opened-with-mode-migration). The §5.1 record lifecycle (draft/reviewed/affirmed) is tracked via population of `affirmation_record` + `seal_hash`. Per A5-bis the two families are deliberately distinct and must not be conflated or normalized.

decision_id.description: Standard §6.2.1 binding identifier, format DR-YYYY-NNN. Renamed from record_id in v5.1.0 reconciliation for 1:1 binding with the Standard.

record_type.description: Standard §6.2.3 discriminator. Defaults to `decision`. When `redaction_event`, the redaction-event field family is required.

record_state.description: Standard §6.2 schema dispatch states. Distinct from the §5.1 record lifecycle (draft/reviewed/affirmed), which is tracked via affirmation_record + seal_hash population. Do not conflate (A5-bis).

dispatch_mode.description: Inherited from Charter mode_declaration at dispatch; may differ post-migration with prior_state_archive. Exhaustive 3-value enum per Standard §4.4 + §6.2.1. The third value carries embedded-summary disclosure at the embed point.

decision_statement.description: Standard §6.2: the decision being made. Required from drafted onward.

context_at_decision.description: Standard §6.2: context known at decision time. Required from drafted onward.

options_considered.description: Standard §6.2: options weighed. Required from drafted onward.

required_inputs_used.description: Standard §6.2: inputs the decision relied on. Required from drafted onward.

assumptions_depended_on.description: Standard §6.2: assumptions the decision depends on. Required from drafted onward.

success_criteria.description: Standard §6.2: how success will be judged. Required from drafted onward.

accountable_owner.description: Standard §6.2.1: single named human accountable for the decision. Required at dispatched.

decision_class.description: Standard §6.2.1: decision class inherited from Charter. Required at dispatched.

dispatched_at.description: Standard §6.2.1: dispatch timestamp. Required at dispatched.

altitude.description: Standard §6.2.3: organizational altitude of the subject. Required from draft onward. Load-bearing for §6.2.3.1 access-policy binding.

consent_posture.description: Standard §6.2.3: consent posture. Conditionally required when altitude is function-leader, team-leader, or individual-professional.

drafting_authority.description: Standard §6.2.3: who/what drafted. Required when dispatch_mode is mode-2 or mode-1-with-embedded-mode-2-summary. Load-bearing for the every_mode_2_record_carries_drafting_authority signal.

disclosure_metadata_pointer.description: Required when dispatch_mode is mode-2, OR Mode 1 record carrying embedded-summary edge case.

affirmation_record.description: Standard §5.1(3): the affirmative human act that promotes a record to the §5.1 `affirmed` lifecycle state. Populated at affirmation. Basis for every_affirmed_record_carries_affirmation_event + no_passive_promotion_to_affirmed_in_sample signals.

seal_hash.description: Standard §5.1(3): integrity seal over the affirmed record. Basis for every_affirmed_record_carries_seal_hash signal.

seal_algorithm.description: Standard §5.1(3): algorithm used to compute seal_hash.

supersedes.description: Standard §5.1(3): reference to the decision_id this record supersedes; null if none. Superseded records remain in the schedule, immutable. Basis for superseded_records_retained_in_full signal.

review_log.description: Standard §6.2.3: structured review log across the §5.1 reviewed lifecycle state.

target_record_hash.description: Standard §6.2.3.2 redaction-event family: seal_hash of the record being redacted. Required when record_type is redaction_event.

target_decision_id.description: Standard §6.2.3.2 redaction-event family: decision_id of the record being redacted. Required when record_type is redaction_event.

redacted_fields.description: Standard §6.2.3.2: enumerated fields redacted. Required when record_type is redaction_event.

redaction_basis.description: Standard §6.2.3.2: basis for redaction. Required when record_type is redaction_event.

redaction_basis_detail.description: Standard §6.2.3.2: free-text detail on the redaction basis. Required when record_type is redaction_event.

redaction_authority.description: Standard §6.2.3.2: named human authorizing the redaction. Required when record_type is redaction_event.

redaction_timestamp.description: Standard §6.2.3.2: when the redaction occurred. Required when record_type is redaction_event.

operational_store_deletion_attestation.description: Standard §6.2.3.2(3): 4-sub-field attestation that the redacted content was deleted from operational stores. Field population is graded by the every_redaction_event_carries_operational_store_deletion_attestation signal; substantive correctness is the deployer's qualified personnel's territory. Required when record_type is redaction_event.

archival_record_retention_basis.description: Standard §6.2.3.2: basis for retaining the archival (sealed) record after operational-store deletion. Required when record_type is redaction_event.

accountable_owner_signoff.description: Standard §6.2.1: accountable owner sign-off at closure. Required at closed.

re_decision_trigger.description: Standard §6.2.1: the re-decision trigger condition recorded at closure. Required at closed.

record_location.description: Standard §6.2.1: resolvable location of the record. Required at closed.

related_decisions.description: Standard §6.2.1: related decision_ids. Required at closed.
